title: SQL Query for User Information
scenario: Write a SQL query to retrieve the first and last names of all users who have an email address ending in '@example.com'. The output should display the names in a single column, separated by a comma.
constraints: Must be a single SELECT statement
Must use the WHERE clause to filter email addresses

evaluationCriteria.description: The query should be syntactically valid SQL
The query should meet the specified constraints
The query should be optimized for performance
